name: feishu-workspace
description: Codex plugin for Feishu/Lark office workspace workflows through lark-cli, including docs, project, mail, approval, meetings, tasks, and more.

interface.longDescription: Feishu Workspace lets Codex route Feishu links and operate common office workspace objects through lark-cli: docs, wiki, sheets, base, drive, calendar, minutes, VC, notes, tasks, IM, mail, approval, contacts, OKR, attendance, slides, whiteboard, markdown, apps, events, Feishu Project work items, workbench views, and reusable team workflows.
defaultPrompt: 读取这个飞书链接并总结重点
把这些内容整理成飞书文档
从会议纪要提取行动项
